---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the problem you're trying to solve.

**Proposed solution**
Describe the feature you'd like to see.

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds you've tried, or other approaches you considered.

**Additional context**
Any other context, screenshots, or references.

---
> **Scope note**: photo-checker is a local macOS tool. Features that require cloud accounts, third-party services, or network access outside of Google Photos / OneDrive are out of scope.
